chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1876 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025. Syed Sarfaraz Ali, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Korai, Advocate representing Respondents / WASA is present alongwith Hanif Hussain Accounts Officer, HW&SC. ***************************************** Counsel representing Respondents / WASA submits statement alongwith cheques bearing No.1387562217 dated 03.10.2025 of Rs.532,776/- and cheque No.1387562218 dated 06.10.2025 of Rs.532,740/- for both Petitioners respectively regarding outstanding monthly Pension from July, 2024 to June, 2025. Additional Registrar of this Court is directed to receive the cheques and subsequently release in favour of the Petitioners after proper verification. Accounts Officer present in Court submits that remaining arrears would be cleared within two months by keeping regular payment of monthly pension and he further submits that the Petitioner may be directed to submit such Photostat copy of deposit slip at their office, for which Counsel present for Petitioner undertakes to do the needful. After such statement, learned counsel for Petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of Petition. Accordingly, the instant Petition is disposed of alongwith pending Application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
